pages.text: An organ extracted from the Warden's cardiac region through violent vivisection, inevitably damaged during removal. It is essentially a pure soul aggregate—absorption grants you their power. Scattered souls form armor, coalesced souls drive energy, leaving only ravenous hunger.$(li)Upon consumption, increases player's soul energy by 10,000 points.$(br)Dropped by Wardens

pages.title: Soul Convergence Room
pages.text: Upon consumption, increases player's soul energy by 30,000 points and prevents Calamity Hunt spawns for 10 minutes.
